# Fixturday

> Free sports tournament management platform. Automatic schedules, real-time standings, online team registration, and a public participant page. Supports football, futsal, basketball, and other team sports.
> Developer: Silvestrs Endelis (mail@endelis.co)
> URL: https://www.fixturday.com

## What Fixturday Does

Fixturday lets sports organisers create and run tournaments in minutes. Organisers add teams, choose a format (round-robin, knockout, or group stage + knockout), and generate the full match schedule automatically. Results are entered on match day and standings update in real time. Every tournament gets a public page participants can follow from their phone — no login required.

## Core Features

- Automatic schedule generation — round-robin, knockout, and group stage formats
- Multi-pitch scheduling with conflict detection
- Real-time standings and results
- Public tournament page for participants (mobile-first, no login)
- Online team registration with organiser approval
- Player roster management per team
- Print-ready match day schedule

## Pricing

Free for all tournament organisers. No subscription, no hidden fees.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.fixturday.com/) — Platform overview and features
- [Active Tournaments](https://www.fixturday.com/tournaments) — Browse all live and upcoming tournaments
- [Guide](https://www.fixturday.com/guide) — Step-by-step guide to creating a tournament
- [About](https://www.fixturday.com/about) — About Fixturday and the team
- [Blog](https://www.fixturday.com/blog) — Tournament organisation guides and tips
- [Changelog](https://www.fixturday.com/changelog) — Platform updates and new features
- [Admin / Sign in](https://www.fixturday.com/admin) — Organiser login (protected)
